channel.title: Blog on Odoevsky in the Future
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Odoevsky in the Future
channel.copyright: This material is public domain, except where a Creative Commons licence applies

item.title: A new home for 4338
item.description:
new version in pdf format#

This website used to be home to notes on teaching of English for Academic Purposes. Now I’ve decided to switch to my translation of 4338. I believe it’s an important and useful thing to keep online. I plan to add more commentaries on it in future.

1926#

This year marks the hundredth anniversary of the publication of 4338 (in approximately its full version) in the magazine “Ogonyok”. There is an English translation by Leland Fetzer in “Pre-Revolutionary Russian Science Fiction: An Anthology” (Ann Arbor 1982), although I’m not sure how easy it would be to find it.
